original_frontmatter_snapshot.name: vercel-react-best-practices
original_frontmatter_snapshot.description: React and Next.js performance optimization guidelines from Vercel Engineering. This skill should be used when writing, reviewing, or refactoring React/Next.js code to ensure optimal performance patterns. Triggers on tasks involving React components, Next.js pages, data fetching, bundle optimization, or performance improvements.
original_frontmatter_snapshot.author: vercel
